g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain L1 Self-awareness in the Social IQ Loop')
sendPrompt('What do I do when I am not emotionally regulated?')
sendPrompt('Explain L2 Observation in the Social IQ Loop')
sendPrompt('What do I do when signals are unclear?')
sendPrompt('Explain L3 State Identification in the Social IQ Loop')
sendPrompt('How do I respond when someone is calm and open?')
sendPrompt('How do I respond when someone is anxious?')
sendPrompt('How do I respond when someone is defensive?')
sendPrompt('How do I respond when someone is angry?')
sendPrompt('How do I respond when someone is excited?')
sendPrompt('How do I respond when someone is stubborn?')
sendPrompt('Explain L4 Reaction Prediction in the Social IQ Loop')
sendPrompt('How do I rethink my angle when the answer is No?')
sendPrompt('Explain L5 Calibrated Response in the Social IQ Loop')
sendPrompt('How do I close the feedback loop after responding?')

svg.text: Observe impact. Loop back to L2.
Social skills and emotional intelligence can be learned.
Use the Social IQ app to practice this loop,
so when you're with people it's automatic.
